ddls:
CREATE TABLE "search_engines" (
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search engine */,
  "engine_name" TEXT /* Name of the search engine */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the search engine */,
  "crawler_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency at which the search engine crawls websites */,
  "ranking_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used by the search engine to rank websites */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the search engine record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the search engine record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "web_traffic" (
  "traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each traffic record */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the search engine driving traffic */,
  "pages_viewed" INTEGER /* Number of pages viewed from the search engine */,
  "percent_contribution" REAL /* Percentage contribution of this traffic to total traffic */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits from this search engine */,
  "percent_hits" REAL /* Percentage of hits from this search engine */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the web traffic */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the website */,
  "browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used to access the website */,
  "traffic_date" TEXT /* Date when the traffic was recorded */,
  "time_on_site" REAL /* Average time spent by users on the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_web_traffic_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("engine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "traffic_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the traffic summary */,
  "total_hits" INTEGER /* Total hits recorded on that date */,
  "total_pages_viewed" INTEGER /* Total number of pages viewed on that date */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Count of unique visitors on that date */,
  "average_session_duration" REAL /* Average duration of user sessions */,
  "bounce_rate" REAL /* Percentage of users who left the website immediately */,
  "pages_per_session" REAL /* Average number of pages viewed during a user session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referral_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referral source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the referral source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the referral source */,
  "source_category" TEXT /* Category of the referral source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the referral source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "source_traffic" (
  "source_traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each source traffic record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the referral source */,
  "pages_viewed" INTEGER /* Number of pages viewed from this source */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits from this source */,
  "source_date" TEXT /* Date when the traffic was recorded */,
  "source_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the website from the referral source */,
  "source_browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used to access the website from the referral source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_source_traffic_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES referral_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the user's account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activity" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user activity record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "activity_duration" REAL /* Duration of the user activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activity_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "campaign_category" TEXT /* Category of the marketing campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Description of the target audience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_traffic" (
  "campaign_traffic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign traffic record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign generating traffic */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the referral source */,
  "hits" INTEGER /* Total hits from the campaign */,
  "pages_viewed" INTEGER /* Number of pages viewed from the campaign */,
  "campaign_date" TEXT /* Date when the traffic was recorded */,
  "campaign_device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the website from the campaign */,
  "campaign_browser_type" TEXT /* Type of browser used to access the website from the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_traffic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_traffic_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_traffic_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES referral_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "search_engine_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "engine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the search engine being analyzed */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance measurement */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Type of performance metric */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "performance_category" TEXT /* Category of the performance metric */,
  "target_value" REAL /* Target value for the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_search_engine_performance_engine_id FOREIGN KEY ("engine_id") REFERENCES search_engines ("engine_id")
)
